content.full_text:
M-
-/ 
State of California 
1 
Memorandum 
t" 
To 
Barbara Milman 
Chief counsel 
?PPc 
JUl 25 
~ 45 AH ~iS 
July 22, 1985 
From 
Governor's Office/Vance Raye 
This memorandum will confirm our conversation of July 15, 
1985 regarding the applicability of Government Code Section 84309 
to campaign contributions mailed to the Governor's Office. 
You 
indicated that Section 84309 has been construed by the Commission 
as not applying to contributions received by mail in a public 
building. 
Therefore, contributions to the Governor or to any other 
official or in support of any cause, and received by mail in the 
Governor's Office may be forwarded to the appropriate campaign 
committee without violating Section 84309. 
Thank you for your advice on this matter.

sections.question_synthetic: Whether Government Code Section 84309 applies to campaign contributions mailed to the Governor's Office.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming memorandum from Governor's Office to FPPC, not an FPPC advice letter. References a prior conversation where FPPC indicated Section 84309 does not apply to mail-in contributions at public buildings. No formal Q/C sections present. Low confidence due to document being incoming correspondence rather than FPPC's formal advice letter response.
